about_text:
Atlanta-based
visual storyteller
Born in Atlanta, Georgia, I'm a photographer who is fascinated about all the things life has to offer and understanding the human experience. 

In my work I like to create a moment you can connect with. A moment, a person can look at and think about or relate to, even if only for a second.

Whether it's landscapes that stretch past the horizon or faces that hold a world of stories, every shot is an act of intention and holds a story.
title: photographerfromatlanta
